'''yanuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadeo|roadeo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadeo|roadeo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yanuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænikith|yænikith]] || [[word:yænikij|yænikij]] || [[word:yænikish|yænikish]] || [[word:yæniki|yæniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanunukuth|yanunukuth]] || [[word:yanunukuj|yanunukuj]] || [[word:yanunukush|yanunukush]] || [[word:yanunuku|yanunuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanukuth|yanukuth]] || [[word:yanukuj|yanukuj]] || [[word:yanukush|yanukush]] || [[word:yanuku|yanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanufkuth|yanufkuth]] || [[word:yanufkuj|yanufkuj]] || [[word:yanufkush|yanufkush]] || [[word:yanufkuf|yanufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanukuthu|yanukuthu]] || [[word:yanukuju|yanukuju]] || [[word:yanukushu|yanukushu]] || [[word:yanukuku|yanukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanukuth|yanukuth]] || [[word:yanukuj|yanukuj]] || [[word:yanukush|yanukush]] || [[word:yanuku|yanuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanukuthul|yanukuthul]] || [[word:yanukujul|yanukujul]] || [[word:yanukushul|yanukushul]] || [[word:yanukukul|yanukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanukuthuthu|yanukuthuthu]] || [[word:yanukujuju|yanukujuju]] || [[word:yanukushushu|yanukushushu]] || [[word:yanukuku|yanukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanukuthun|yanukuthun]] || [[word:yanukujun|yanukujun]] || [[word:yanukushun|yanukushun]] || [[word:yanukukun|yanukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanukuthuoro|yanukuthuoro]] || [[word:yanukujuoro|yanukujuoro]] || [[word:yanukushuoro|yanukushuoro]] || [[word:yanukukuoro|yanukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
